title: Profitable Residential & Commercial Cleaning Business - 45% YOY Growth
description:
This is an established, thriving, recession-proof residential and commercial cleaning franchise in Tyler, Texas. Turnkey operation with exceptional momentum, backed by a nationally recognized brand. With consistent 45% YOY growth in revenue and customer base, this isn't just a business – it's a high-potential investment opportunity. Streamlined processes ensure smooth daily operations with a focus on recurring residential maid services (64% of revenue) and project-based cleans. Fully trained team of 10 full-time employees could allow for semi-absentee ownership after transition. Perfect for entrepreneurs seeking work-life balance or portfolio addition. Stellar reputation with a 4.9/5 Google rating from satisfied customers drives low-cost leads via referrals. 8 years remaining on the agreement (renewable). Leverage a proven system, national marketing, training, and technology for low-risk scaling. This franchise isn't just profitable today – it's positioned for explosive future earnings.

Ad#:2461063
